description_long: This figure represents an adult pedestrian dressed in futuristic, tactical attire with a full-body armored suit. The individual wears a helmet with a visor, shoulder and chest armor, and segmented arm and leg guards, giving a robotic or exoskeleton appearance. The arms are elongated and end in claw-like appendages, suggesting either prosthetics or advanced armor. The chest features a harness or utility belt with visible pouches or devices attached. The overall build is slender, and the suit appears to be made of matte, hard materials with minimal surface gloss. The posture is slightly hunched, with the head tilted forward and arms bent at the elbows.
description: A futuristic adult pedestrian in a full-body armored suit with a helmet, segmented armor, and claw-like hands, exuding a robotic or exoskeleton vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmeted head, chest harness, and claw-like hands clearly, with the full armored suit visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the segmented arm and leg armor, helmet profile, and the forward-leaning posture.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the helmet, shoulder armor, and the suit's streamlined back, with arm and leg armor visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the helmet, arm, and leg armor, and the bent posture.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic armored suit with helmet, segmented body armor, and utility harness
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by helmet
